assertions.assertion: Test with role=admin claims asserts HttpStatusCode.NoContent (204)
assertions.rationale: DeleteProduct_AsAdmin_ShouldReturn204 sets role=admin and asserts HttpStatusCode.NoContent.

assertions.assertion: Test with role=viewer claims asserts HttpStatusCode.Forbidden (403)
assertions.rationale: DeleteProduct_AsViewer_ShouldReturn403 sets role=viewer and asserts HttpStatusCode.Forbidden.

assertions.assertion: Test with no claims (unauthenticated) asserts HttpStatusCode.Unauthorized (401)
Each test sets distinct claims via the TestClaimsProvider before making the request
assertions.rationale: Each test calls _factory.ClaimsProvider.SetClaims() or ClearClaims() with different claim sets.

assertions.assertion: Uses IClassFixture<T> or equivalent to share the WebApplicationFactory across tests
